dialogue: Hello, this Ravi from IT Support. You raised ticket about your laptop freezing? Yes, it keeps hanging during video calls. Got it. Can you tell me your device model and when the issue started? It's Dell Latitude 5520. Started happening this Monday. Okay. First, please check if Windows updates are pending. Sometimes that causes lag. Let me check... yes, there are 3 pending updates. Please run them and restart. If it persists, raise another ticket and we'll escalate. Alright, thanks Ravi.

Hi, this is Meera from the Helpdesk. Am I speaking with Arjun from accounts? Yes, that's me. Hi Arjun. Your VPN access request has been approved. I'm calling to walk you through setup. Oh great, I've been waiting for this. Sure. Please open the company portal and download the VPN client from the IT section. Done. It's downloading. Perfect. Once installed, use your employee ID and existing password to log in. That worked! Thank you so much.

Good afternoon, this is Nandini from IT. Are you the one having issues with the office printer? Yes, I am. It's an HP LaserJet and it's not responding to print commands. Okay. Have you restarted the printer? Yes, once. Alright. Please check if it shows up under Devices and Printers on your computer. It's showing as offline. Right-click it and select 'See what's printing', then click 'Printer' and uncheck 'Use Printer Offline'. Done! It's printing now. Thank you! Great. Let us know if the issue returns.

Namaste sir, main HDFC Bank se Pooja bol rahi hoon. Aapke savings account ke baare mein call kar rahi hoon. Ji boliye. Sir, aapka minimum balance look, threshold alert trigger hua hai. Balance 25,000 se neeche hai. Haan, mujhe pata tha. Kal transfer karunga. Bilkul sir. Koi aur madad chahiye? basically, Nahi, shukriya.

Hello sir, State Bank se Ramesh speaking. Aapki FD agle mahine mature ho rahi hai. Haan, mujhe email aaya tha. Sir, kya aap renew karna chahenge ya account mein transfer karein? Account mein transfer kar dijiye. Sure sir. Koi nominee change karna hai? Nahi, sab theek hai. Perfect. Processing ho jayegi. Have a nice day.

Good morning sir, naan Canara Bank-la irundhu Pradeep pesuren. Unga account-la auto-debit setup pathi. Haan, enna problem? Sir, unga ECS mandate renewal pending-aa irukku. Update pannanum. Enna pannanum? Sir, nearest branch-ku poyee form submit pannunga. Online option also available. Okay nandri.

Hello, this is Deepa from Kotak Mahindra Bank's loan department. Yes? Sir, I'm calling to inform you that your home loan EMI for this month has been successfully processed. Great, thank you for confirming. You're welcome. Your outstanding balance is now 14.2 lakh rupees. Okay. Is there a way to prepay? Yes sir, you can prepay via net banking with no prepayment penalty after 3 years. That's helpful. I'll look into it.

Hello, am I speaking with Mrs. Kavitha? Yes, this is Kavitha. Good morning madam. I'm Suresh calling from LIC regarding your policy renewal due next month. Yes, I received a letter about it. Correct madam. You can renew online at the LIC portal, at the nearest branch, or via cheque. I'll do it online. What documents do I need? Just your policy number and registered mobile number. No documents needed for basic renewal. Perfect, thank you.

Namaste madam, main Star Health Insurance se Anita bol rahi hoon. Ji boliye. Madam, aapki health policy ki renewal date 15 tarikh hai. Reminder ke liye call kar rahi hoon. Haan, main online renew kar lungi. Bilkul madam. Koi cashless hospital add karna ho toh website par update kar sakte ho. Theek hai, shukriya.

Hello sir, this is Jio customer care calling. I'm Rohan. Yes? Sir, we noticed your data pack expires in 2 days. Calling to inform you. Yes, I'll recharge soon. You can also set up auto-recharge via the MyJio app to avoid interruptions. Oh, I didn't know that. I'll check. Sure sir. Have a good day.

Sir, naan Airtel customer care-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga broadband plan pathi. Enna problem? Problem illa sir. Unga current plan 100 Mbps. New 200 Mbps plan same price-la available. Upgrade free-aa? Aama sir, no extra charge. Just confirm pannunga. Okay, confirm pannuren. Nandri.

Hello, this is BSNL customer support. Am I talking to Mr. Venkat? Yes. Sir, there is basically, a scheduled look, maintenance in your area tomorrow between 2 and 4 PM. Your internet may be disrupted. Okay, noted. How long will the downtime last? Maximum 2 hours sir. Apologies for the inconvenience. Alright, thanks for the heads up.
This is a reminder from Axis Bank. Please complete your KYC update to avoid account restrictions.
Your PAN-Aadhaar linking deadline is approaching. Please visit incometax.gov.in to complete the process.
Dear customer, your Jio SIM KYC update is pending. Visit the nearest store or update via the MyJio app.
Namaste sir, HDFC Bank ki taraf se reminder hai. Aapkka KYC update karein. Bank branch ya net bankingg se update ho sakta hai.
Vanakkam sir, SBI Bank-la irudhu reminder. Ugna KYC update panna nerest branch-ku visit pannunga.
Your mutual fund account with Groww requires nominee update as per SBEI regulations. Pleease log in to complete.

Hello sir, naan TCS IT helpdesk-la irundhu Karthik pesuren. Haan boliye. Sir, unga laptop remote access request approve aayiruchu. Anydesk install aayirucha? Haan install aayiruchu. Sir, ID share pannunga, naan connect pannuren and issue resolve pannuren. Ok. ID 123456789. Connected sir. Checking the issue now. Browser cache clear panrom.

Hello, is this Priya? Yes speaking. Hi, this is Ajay from Amazon delivery. Your package is out for delivery today. Will you be home? Yes I'll be home after 4 PM. Noted, we'll attempt delivery between 4 and 7 PM. Thank you.
Hello sir, Swiggy delivery partner speaking. Aapka order ready hai aur main 10 minute mein pahunch raha hoon. Okay, main building ke bahar hoon. Perfect sir. Blue hoodie mein hoon. Theek hai.
Hello madam, naan Flipkart delivery-la irundhu pesuren. Unga order today deliver aagum. Okay, enna time? Madam, 3 to 6 PM between. Home-la iruppinga? Aama, iruppein. Nandri.

Hello, am I speaking with Mr. Sudhir? Yes. Good morning sir. This is Apollo Hospitals calling to confirm your appointment with Dr. Meera on Thursday at 3 PM. Yes, I'll be there. Please carry your previous reports and arrive 15 minutes early for registration. Sure, thank you.

Namaste madam, main Fortis Hospital se bol rahi hoon. Aapki blood test report ready hai. Achha, kab le sakti hoon? Aap anytime 9 AM se 6 PM ke beech aa sakti hain lab section mein. Theek hai, aaj aa jaati hoon. Shukriya.

Hello sir, this is Vikram from ICICI Bank. You've been pre-approved for a personal loan of 10 lakhs. I didn't apply for any loan. Sir, this is based on your excellent credit score. Just a few minutes to verify details. What details? Just your PAN number and date of birth for verification. I'm not comfortable sharing that over phone. Can you share the offer via official email? Of course sir. Let me note your email.

Namaste sir, main IndusInd Bank se Priya bol rahi hoon. Aapko lifetime free credit card offer hai. Kaun sa bank? IndusInd Bank sir. 5 lakh limit, no joining fee. Maine apply nahi kiya tha. Sir, aap eligible hain based on credit history. Bas Aadhaar number verify karni hai. Aadhaar main phone par share nahi karta. Official website par process karo. Sure sir, link bhej deti hoon.

Hello madam, SBI credit cardd division. Unga credit score very good-aa irukku. Pre-approved card offer. Enna offer? 3 lakh limit, no annual fee. Bas Aadhaar last 4 digits confirm pannunga. Last 4 digits-aa? Verification-ku madam. Naan directly SBI website-la check pannuren. Official channel use pannuvein.

Sir, this is from Bajaj Finance. You have a pre-approved EMI card with 1 lakh limit. What do I need to do? Just provide your date of birth and last 4 digits of your Aadhaar. That sounds a lot to share on a call. Let me visit the store instead. Sir, we can do it over the phone to save time. I'd prefer to visit in person. Thank you.

Good afternoon, I'm calling from a consumer research firm. We're conducting a survey on digital payments. Just 3 minutes? Okay sure. Great. Do you use UPI or debit card more often? UPI mostly. Wonderful. Last question — what is your approximate monthly spend on online shopping? Why do you need that? That seems personal. It's only for statistical purposes, no personal data is stored. I'd rather not share that.

Hello sir, naan market research firm-la irundhu call pannuren. FMCG survey, just 2 minutes. Enna survey? Sir, unga grocery shopping habits pathi. End-la 300 rupees Paytm cash gift. Free gift-aa? Seri, kelu. Sir, monthly grocery spending evlo? Idhu personal question. Yen kelkureenga? Statistical purpose only sir. No data stored.

Namaste sir, main ek consumer survey ke liye call kar rahi hoon. Naye government scheme ke baare mein. Kaun sa scheme? PM Awas Yojana ke benefits ke baare mein. Aap eligible hain. Mujhe kaise pata? Sir, bas income details bata dijiye, main check karti hoon. Pehle official website ka link bhejo. Main verify karunga.

Good evening sir, I'm calling from a wealth management firm. We have an investment opportunity with 18% annual returns. 18% seems very high. Which company is this? Sir, it's a new fintech startup backed by prominent investors. Very limited slots. Can you send me the SEBI registration details? Of course sir. Let me get your email. Please send official documentation first. I'll review before deciding.

Hello sir, main ek investment platform se Sanjay bol raha hoon. Cryptocurrency arbitrage mein 20% monthly return guaranteed. 20% monthly? That's 240% annually? Haan sir, algorithm-based trading. Very safe. Koi SEBI registration hai? Sir, crypto unregulated hai, SEBI nahi lagti. But trusted platform hai. Main pehle research karunga.

Hello madam, this is from a mutual fund advisory. We have a new SIP with guaranteed 15% returns. Mutual funds don't guarantee returns. That's unusual. Madam, this is a special fixed-return scheme. Can you share the offer document? Sending shortly madam. Please do. I'll consult my financial advisor before investing.

Sir, naan government welfare department-la irundhu pesuren. PM Kisan scheme-la unga name register aayiruchu. Enakku theriyaadhe. Sir, 2000 rupees quarterly benefit. Bas Aadhaar number verify pannunga. Official portal-la irukka? Haan sir, pm-kisan.gov.in. But direct verification faster. Naan portal-la login pannuren. Ange confirm pannuvein.

Hello, this is from PM Mudra Loan scheme helpline. You are eligible for 5 lakh business loan with minimal interest. How did you get my number? Sir, from MSME registry. Just basic verification needed. What verification? Bank account number and GST number. I'll apply through official MUDRA website only. Thank you.

Hello sir, this from Flipkart refund team. Your last order has eligible refund of 800 rupees. Which order? The electronics order from last week sir. We need to verify your registered email. What do you need exactly? Just your registered mobile number to trigger refund. Why would you need my number? You should already it if I ordered from Flipkart. Standard verification sir. I'll check the refund directly on app.

Namaste sir, Amazon refund department se bol raha hoon. Aapka 1200 rupees refund pending hai. Kaun sa order? Kitchen appliances ka sir. Please registered number confirm karein. Aap mujhe number kyun pooch rahe ho? Aapke paas hona chahiye. Sir, system update ke baad data lost ho gaya. Main app par check karta hoon.

Vanakkam madam, naan Federal Bank-la irundhu Rajan pesuren. Unga account-la unusual login detect aayiruchu. Enna? Enakku theriyaadhe! Madam, someone is trying to access your account from a different city. To block immediately, OTP share pannunga. OTP share pannuvaa? Madam, time waste panna vendaam. 30 seconds-la account empty aayidum. Illa, naan bank-ku directly call pannuren. Unga number block panni. Madam please— Call cut pannuren.

Sir, naan ICICI Bank fraud cell-la irundhu pesuren. Unga net banking-la suspicious login irukkku. Enna? How? Sir, Tamil Nadu-la irundhu login attempt. Unga account protect panna, ATM card last 4 digits sollunga. Adhellam phone-la sollla maatein. Sir, unga account block aagum. Aagattum. Naan bank-ku poven. Idhu scam.

Hello madam, naan SBI Net Banking team-la irundhu call pannuren. Madam unga internet banking password expire aayiruchu. Okay, enna pannanum? Madam, over phone reset pannalam. Unga current password sollunga first. Password phone-la solluvaa? Madam it's secure protocol. Illai sir, naan branch-ku poven. Idhu scam-a irukku.

Hello sir, main SBI Cyber Cell se bol raha hoon. Aapke account mein kal raat fraudulent transaction attempt hua. Kya? Main kuch nahi jaanta. Sir, 45,000 rupees debit hone wale the. Abhi block kiya hai. Lekin aapka OTP chahiye to cancel the request permanently. OTP kyun chahiye? Sir, OTP se hi cancel hoga. Jaldi batao. Nahi sir, main khud bank jaata hoon. OTP kisi ko nahi dunga.

Namaste sir, main Punjab National Bank se Ankit bol raha hoon. Aapka debit card kisi ne online use kiya. Kab? Aaj subah 6 baje, Amazon US se 15,000 rupees ka transaction. Maine nahi kiya! Sir, refund ke liye hume aapka CVV aur OTP chahiye. CVV refund ke liye kyun? Sir, system verification hai. Jaldi karo warna time limit hai. Yeh fraud lag raha hai. Main helpline pe call karta hoon.

Hello, Axis Bank se Neha bol rahi hoon. Aapke account mein China se login attempt hua. China se? Haan sir. Account lock hone se bachane ke lyie Aadhaar number batao. Aadhaar kyun? Identity verification ke liye. Main khud bank portal par jaata hoon. Apa fraud ho.

Good morning, this is Officer Rahul from SBI's digital security team. We detected an unauthorized login to your account. That's alarming. What should I do? Please confirm your account number and the OTP sent to your number so we can secure the account immediately. I received an OTP but it says "Do not share with anyone." That disclaimer is just standard. For bank officials it's required to proceed. No, I won't share it. I'll visit the branch. Sir, by the time you get there the account may be drained— Goodbye. This is a scam.

Hello, this is from HDFC digital banking. Your account shows a suspicious transaction of 38,000 rupees. What? When? Just now sir. To reverse it we need your CVV and card expiry date. Why would you need CVV to reverse a transaction? It's a new RBI mandate for fraud reversal. I've never heard of that. I'm calling HDFC helpline directly. Sir that will take too long— I'll take that chance. Goodbye.

Congratulations! You've been selected as the winner of Amazon's 5th anniversary lucky draw! You've won a brand new iPhone 15 and 50,000 cash! I don't remember entering any draw. Sir, it was automatic. Your mobile number was randomly selected from Prime customers. What do I need to do? Just pay a processing and courier charge of 3,500 rupees and the prize will be dispatched. Pay to receive a prize? That's a scam. Sir, this is completely legitimate— Blocking this number now.

Hello sir, you have won TATA Motors lucky draw! First prize a brand new Tata Nexon! I never participated. Sir, it an automatic lucky draw for all registered voters in your constituency. That sounds very strange. Sir, just pay 10,000 registration charges and car is yours. Nobody charges you to collect a car you've won. This a scam. Sir please— Disconnecting.

Badhai ho sir! Aap Flipkart Diwali Bumper Draw mein 2 lakh rupees jeete hain! Maine Flipkart lottery mein participate nahi kiya tha. Sir, yeh automatically sab Prime customers ke liye tha. Paisa kaise milega? Sir, pehle GST 18,000 rupees Paytm karo. Uske baad full amount aapke account mein 30 minutes mein. Jeeto aur phir pehle paisa do? Yeh pakka fraud hai. Sir sach bol raha hoon— Karo call cut.

Hello sir! Aap IRCTC anniversary lucky draw ke winner hain! 1 lakh ka prize! IRCTC prize? Haan sir, aapne pichle mahine ticket book kiya tha, usi se entry hui. Claim kaise karun? Sir, GST aur processing fee 12,000 rupees bhejne honge pehle. Prize milne ke baad fee kyun? Niyam hai sir. Baat nahi karni aapse. Scam hai yeh.

Vanakkam sir! Neenga Reliance Jio anniversary draw-la Honda City jeetchirukinga! Car-aa? Naan participate pannalaye? Sir, all Jio users-ku automatic entry irukkku. Unga number lucky-aa select aayiruchu. Eppadi claim pannuvein? Sir, RTO registration 25,000 rupees advance-aa pay pannanum. Aprom car deliver pannuvom. Car jeetchavanukku yen advance pay pannanum? Scam-nu theriyudhu. Sir please— Call cut.

Congratulations sir! Neenga Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra won pannirkinga lucky draw-la! Naan participate pannale. Sir, Samsung India registered customers-ku automatic draw. Eppadi receive pannuvein? Sir, delivery charge 4500 Google Pay-la pay pannunga. Aprom courier pannuvom. Product claim panna pay pannuvaa? Scam dhaane idhu. No sir, genuine dhaan— Illa, poyen.

Hello, this is Officer Sharma fromm the Income Tax Department, Enforcement Division. Yes? Sir, there is a case registered against you for tax evasion of 3.5 lakh rupees from financial year 2022-23. I filed my returns on time. Oru forensic audit says otherwise. A warrant is being issued. But you can settle this now by paying 50,000 rupees. A warrant? Send me official notice. No notice is sent before arrest sir. Pay immediately via UPI or face consequences. I'll contact my CA and a lawyer. This sounds like fraud.

This is CBI Officer Mehta. You are under investigation for money laundering. What? I'm a salaried employee. Sir, your account received suspicious transfers. You need to cooperate or face arrest today. I need a legal notice for that. Sir, emergency powers allow immediate action. Transfer 1 lakh to a safe government account. Government doesn't take money over phone. This is a scam. I'm reporting this call.

Sir, Income Tax department se bol raha hoon. Aapka refund 35,000 rupees pending hai. Sach mein? Haan sir. Process ke liye aapka net banking login ID aur password chahiye. Login ID password kisi ko nahi deta. Sir, bina iske refund nahi hoga. IT department kabhi password nahi maangti. Yeh scam hai.

Hello sir, this is Microsoft technical support. Your computer has been sending error alerts to our servers. Errors? What kind? Sir, your Windows license has been flagged for suspicious activity. Your personal data is at risk. What do I need to do? Please download our remote access software and give us access to fix it. Microsoft doesn't call users proactively for errors. This is a scam. Sir, your data will be wiped— Goodbye.

Hello, this is Google security team. Your Gmail account has been accessed from an unknown device. Oh no, really? Yes madam. To protect your account, please share the OTP sent to your phone. It says for Gmail account verification. Yes madam, that's the security code. Please share. Wait, Google would never ask for OTP over a call. This is a phishing scam. Madam please— Reporting this number.

Namaste sir, main HP technical support se bol raha hoon. Aapka printer malware se infected hai. Printer malware? Possible hai? Haan sir, modern printers mein virus ho sakta hai. Remote access dedo, abhi fix kar deta hoon. Remote access printer ko? Sir, computer se connect hai, isliye computer bhi risk mein hai. HP kabhi is tarah call nahi karta. Yeh scam lagta hai.

Sir, naan Apple India support-la irundhu pesuren. Unga iPhone iCloud account hack aayiruchu. Hack-aa? Aama sir. Unga Apple ID password share pannunga, naan reset pannuren. Apple ID password share panna solluvingalaa? Absolute scam. Sir time waste panna vendaam— Call cut.

Hello sir, this is from FedEx India. We have a parcel from Dubai in your name containing important documents and cash. From Dubai? I don't know anyone there. Sir, it was sent by your relative. The parcel is held at customs. You need to pay a 7,500 rupees customs clearance fee. Cash in a parcel? And customs over a phone call? Sir, it's urgent. Pay immediately or parcel will be returned. This is obviously a scam. I'm not paying anything.

Namaste madam, main DHL Express se bol rahi hoon. Aapka parcel London se aaya hai. Customs clearance ke liye 4,500 rupees pay karne honge. London se mujhe koi parcel nahi bheja. Madam, unke paas aapka address tha. London mein mera koi nahi. Yeh fraud hai. Madam, warna parcel destroy ho jayega— Call cut.

Hello sir, naan BlueDart customs-la irundhu call pannuren. Sir, unga name-la parcel irukku. America-la irundhu vanthirukkuu. America-la enakku therinja aar illai. Sir, unga address irundhuchu. Customs duty 8000 rupees pay pannanum. America-la irundhu parcel, customs call phone-la? Scam dhaan.

Hi, is this Anand? Yes, who's this? Hi Anand! I'm Preethi. We matched on a dating app last week. Remember? I don't think so, I don't use dating appps. Maybe you're confusing it with another app. Anyway, I'm in trouble. I'm stranded at the airport and lost my wallet. Can you transfer 5,000 rupees? We've never met and you're asking for money? This is a scam. Anand please, I'll payy back— Blocking this number.

Hello sir, main Riya bol rahi hoon. Humne pichle week Instagram par baat ki thi. Remember? Mujhe yaad nahi hai. Sir, mujhe abhi emergency hai. Meri maa hospital mein hain. 8,000 rupees chahiye. Kal wapas kar dungi. Hum stranger hain. Mujhse paise kyun maangrahi ho? Sir please, I'm desperate— Yeh fraud call hai. Karo cut.

Hello sir, I'm calling from a multinational company's HR team. You applied for a data entry position online. Okay yes, I did. Congratulations, you've been selected! We just need a registration fee of 2,500 rupees to process your appointment letter. Registration fee for a job? Yes sir, it's refundable after 3 months. No legitimate company charges for joining. This is a job scam.

Namaste sir, aapka resume Naukri.com par dekha. Hum aapko 50,000 per month WFH job offer kar rahe hain. Kaunsi company hai? TechGlobal Solutions sir, Bangalore se. Selection ho gaya. Bas 3,000 rupees training kit fee bhejni hai. Job ke liye training fee? Sir, refundable hai. Koi bhi legitimate company joining fee nahi leti. Scam hai yeh.

Hello madam, naan HR team-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga resume-la naan pathen. Work from home job, 35000 monthly. Enna work? Data entry madam. Selected aayinga. Registration 2000 rupees pay pannunga. Job-ku registration fee-aa? Refundable madam. Genuine job-la yen fee pay pannanum? Scam dhaan idhu.

Hello, this is from BESCOM electricity department. Your electricity will be disconnected in 2 hours due to pending dues. I pay my bills regularly! Sir, our system shows an arrear of 3,200 rupees. Pay via UPI immediately to avoid disconnection. I'll check my BESCOM app. Sir, no time! Pay now on this UPI ID. BESCOM app shows no dues. You're a fraud. Sir the system may not be updated— Goodbye!!

Namaste sir, BSES electricity office se bol raha hoon. Aapke ghar ki bijli 1 ghante mein kategi. Kyun? Bill pending hai 2,800 rupees. Abhi UPI pe bhejo. Main app check karta hoon... koi pending nahi dikh raha. Sir app update nahi hua. Aap fraud ho. Main helpline pe report karta hoon.

Hello sir, naan TNEB electricity department-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga connection 1 hour-la cut aagum. Yen? Sir, bill pending 1800 rupees. Ippo UPI pay pannunga. Naan app check pannuren... dues illaye? Sir app update aagale. TNEB number-ku directly call pannuren. Neenga fraud!!!

Hello sir, this is from National Insurance. Your policy claim of 80,000 rupees is approved! Really? Which policy? Your motor insurance sir. Just pay a processing fee of 5,000 rupees for release. A processing fee to receive my own claim money? Standard protocol sir. That's not how insurance claims work. This is fraud.

Sir, main LIC agent se bol raha hoon. Aapki policy ka bonus 1.2 lakh approved hua hai. Kaunsi policy? Endowment plan sir. Sirf 7,000 rupees service charge bhejo, pura amount aayega. Bonus release ke liye charge? Aisa nahi hota. Sir genuine hai— LIC helpline pe confirm karunga. Aap fraud lagte ho.

Vanakkam sir, naan LIC-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga policy bonus 90,000 rupees approve aayiruchu. Enna policy? Sir, endowment plan. Just 6,000 rupees processing fee pay pannunga. Bonus release-ku fee-aa? Idhu insurance-la illave. Sir genuine— LIC helpline-ku call pannuren. Neenga fraud.

Hello sir, this is from TRAI (Telecom Regulatory Authority). Your mobile number has been flagged for sending 50 spam messages. I never sent spam. Sir, your number will be permanently blocked in 2 hours. To avoid this, press 9 to speak with our executive. TRAI doesn't call users directly. This is a robocall scam. Sir this is genuine— Blocking.

Sir, TRAI se call aa rahi hai. Aapka number fake documents use karke register hua hai. Aaj look, raat block hoga. Kya? Main listen, legitimate user hoon. Sir, block rokne ke liye Aadhaar number verify karo. TRAI is tarah call nahi karta. Yeh fraud hai.

Hello sir, naan TRAI-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga number illegal activity-ku use aayiruchu. Tonight block aagum. Naan illegal activity pannalaye. Sir, block avoid panna Aadhaar number verify pannunga. TRAI users-ku direct call panna maataaranga. Fraud.

Hello sir, this is Mohan from Amazon's refund department. We have a refund of 3,200 rupees for your recent order. Which order exactly? The electronics item returned last week. I'll process the refund now. Please share the OTP sent to your number. I got an OTP. It says "OTP for payment transaction." Why does it say payment? Sir, that's just how the system phrases it. It's actually for the refund credit. No, this is exactly how fraud calls work. You want to deduct money using this OTP. Goodbye.

Namaste madam, main Meesho customer care se bol rahi hoon. Aapka 1,500 rupees refund process karna hai. Theek hai. Madam, OTP share karein jo abhi aaya hai. OTP mein likha hai 'fund transfer ke liye.' Refund mein transfer kyun hoga? Madam woh bas system language hai. Nahi, yeh clearly fraud hai. Report karungi.

Hello madam, naan Myntra refund team-la irundhu pesuren. 950 rupees refund process panna OTP share pannunga. OTP message-la irukku: 'debit transaction.' Yen debit? Madam, system wording dhaan. Refund-ku dhaan. Illa madam, idhu fraud. Call cut panni report panruven.

Hello, this is Assistant Commissioner Verma from Cyber Crime Branch. You are under digital arrest. Digital arrest? What does that mean? Sir, your name has appeared in drug trafficking investigation. You cannot leave your home until cleared. This is not a legal concept in India. Sir, it is. You must pay 2 lakh clearing fee to remove your name from case. I'm calling 100. This fraudulent call.

Main DCP Sharma bol raha hoon Cyber Crime Division se. Aap digital arrest mein hain. Yeh kya hota hai? Sir, aapka account money laundering mein involve hai. Ghar se mat nikliye. Yeh koi legal process nahi hai. Digital arrest jaisa kuch nahi hota India mein. Sir, case serious hai— Ruk ke 1930 pe complaint karunga. Aap fraud ho.

Sir, naan CBI officer Suresh pesuren. Neenga digital arrest-la irukinga. Enna idhu? Sir, unga account hawala transaction-la involve aayiruchu. 1.5 lakh pay pannunga case close aagum. India-la digital arrest legal concept illai. Idhu scam. Sir serious consequence irukku— 1930-ku report panni call cut pannuren.

Hello Ramesh, it's Sneha. We've been talking on WhatsApp for a month now. I have good news! Oh hi Sneha. What news? I'm finally coming to visit you from London. But I'm stuck at Mumbai airport. My visa extension fee is 15,000 rupees. Can you help? You're from London but stuck at Mumbai airport and calling me for money? Ramesh please, I really like you. I'll pay back when I arrive. I've never met you. This is a classic romance scam. I'm not sending any money.

Hello sir, this is FastLoan app support. Your loan of 50,000 rupees is approved! I applied last week. Great! Sir, to release the amount, pay a 2,500 rupees insurance premium first. Why insurance before I get the loan? It's mandatory sir. All loan apps require this. No legitimate app deducts fees before disbursal. This is a scam.

Namaste sir, CashQuick loan app se bol raha hoon. Aapka 1 lakh loan approved hai. Sach mein? Kab milega? Sir, pehle 3,000 processing fee bhejni hogi. Loan milne se pehle fee? Sir, RBI ka niyam hai. RBI aisa nahi kehta. Loan apps pehle fee nahi lete. Fraud hai.

Hello sir, naan InstaMoney app-la irundhu call pannuren. 75,000 loan approved aayiruchu. Enna process? Sir, 2000 rupees insurance premium pay pannunga. Aprom 30 mins-la amount credit aagum. Loan-ku advance fee-aa? Yaarum ippadi panna maataaranga. Scam.

Hello, I got your nummber from a mutual friend. I'm running an online part-time job. Like and subscribe YouTube videos and earn 3,000 to 5,000 daily. That sounds too easy to be real. Sir, it's simple. First complete 3 tasks and receive 500 rupees. Then invest 5,000 for bigger returns. Invest? I thought it was just clicking videos. Initial investment sir. Returns in 24 hours. This is a task scam. You'll disappear after I invest. Blocking you.

Namaste sir, main ek YouTube task job offer kar raha hoon. Ghar baithe 4,000 rupees daily kamao. Kya karna hoga? Videos like karo aur comment karo. Pehle 3 free tasks, fir thoda listen, invest karke zyada kamaao. actually, Invest kyun? Returns milenge sir, 200% daily. Aise returns possible nahi. Yeh scam hai.

Hello madam, YouTube part time job offer. Daily 3000-5000 earn pannalam. Enna work? Videos like, subscribe, comment pannunga. Pehle 3 free tasks, then 3000 rupees invest panna 8000 return. Invest pannuvaa? Idhu task scam. Block pannuvein.

Hello sir, I'm calling from HDFC Bank's home loan department. Yes? Sir, your EMI for this month has been debited successfully. Confirmation SMS was sent. Yes, I saw it. Thank you. Your outstanding principal is now 22 lakh. Shall I email a full statement? Yes please, that would be helpful.

Good morning madam, naan SBI-la irundhu Kavitha pesuren. Unga home loan EMI related call. Haan, enna vishayam? Madam, this month EMI bounce aayiruchu. Sufficient balance irukka check pannunga. Oh, transfer panna maranthuvitten. Ippo pannuren. Sure madam. Late fee avoid panna today transfer pannunga. Okay, thanks for informing.

Namaste sir, main Paytm Payments Bank se bol raha hoon. Ji? Sir, aapka Paytm KYC complete hai. Ab aap 2 lakh tak balance rakh sakte hain. Oh achha. Koi action leni hai mujhe? Nahi sir, sirf confirm karna tha. Have a good day. Dhanyawad.

Hello, this is Vivek from NSDL. Your PAN card reissue request has been processed. Oh great. When will I receive it? It'll be dispatched within 7 working days to your registered address. Okay, thank you. You can also track the status on the NSDL portal using your acknowledgement number. Perfect.

Hi sir, I'm from Zerodha support. You had raised a ticket about your holdings not showing. Yes, since yesterday. Apologies for the delay. It was a backend sync issue. It's been resolved. Please log out and log back in. Let me check... Yes, the holdings are visible now! Thank you. Great! Let me know if anything else comes up.

Namaste madam, main OYO customer support se bol rahi hoon. Aapki Goa booking ke baare mein call kar rahi hoon. Haan, koi problem hai kya? Madam, booked hotel temporary renovation mein hai. Hum same area mein better property offer kar rahe hain same price par. Okay, property ka naam kya hai? Madam, Sunset Beach Resort. Breakfast bhi included hai. Achha, sounds good. Confirm kar dijiye. Done madam. Confirmation SMS bhej rahi hoon.

Hello sir, naan MakeMyTrip customer care-la irundhu Keerthi pesuren. Haan, enna vishayam? Sir, unga Chennai to Bangalore flight schedule change aayiruchu. 2 hours late. Okay, alternative flight irukka? Sir, 6 AM flight available. Same price. Switch pannalama? Seri, switch pannunga. Nandri.

Hello sir, I represent a company offering solar panel installation with 70% government subsidy. Really? 70% subsidy? Yes sir, PM Solar Scheme. Very limited slots remaining. Can I see the scheme details? Sending brochure. But we need a 10,000 advance to block your slot. Advance before seeing official documents? I'll verify on the government portal first.

Sir, naan real estate consultant-la irundhu call pannuren. Chennai outskirts-la plots available. 40% below market rate. 40% below rate-aa? Yen? Sir, developer needs quick sales. Limited slots only. Documents verify panna mudiyuma? Yes sir. But token advance 25,000 pay pannunga to block. Advance without documents? Naan verify panni decide pannuvein.

Hello madam, main ek NGO se bol raha hoon jo underprivileged children ke liye kaam karta hai. Theek hai, kya chahiye? Madam, 500 rupees donation karein. Immediately Paytm par. Donation karna chahti hoon, lekin pehle NGO ka registration number dikhao. Madam trust karo— Bina verification ke nahi. Aap email karo official documents.

Hello sir, I'm collecting donations for a cancer hospital for children. Any amount would help. Which hospital? Hope Children's Cancer Foundation, sir. Can I see your credentials? I have an ID card sir, can I WhatsApp a photo? I'd prefer to donate directly to the hospital's official accoun.t Can you share their bank details from the website? Let me check and get back to you sir.
Your electricity bill of Rs 1,240 for the month of January is due by 28th February. Pay via the BESCOM app, website, or nearest payment center.
Aapka Bharat Gas cylinder booking confirm ho gaya hai. Delivery agle 2-3 din mein hogi. Tracking ke liye app use karein.
Sir, nga vehicle insurance renewal de date March 10. Online reenewal-ku policybazaar.com visit pannunga.
Reminder: Your passport application status can be cecked at passportindia.gov.in usin your file number.

Hello sir, CBI officer speaking from the National Cyber Crime wing. Yes? Sir, your name has been linked to 47 fake bank accounts. This is a serious charge. That's impossible. I've done nothing illegal. Sir, you will be arrested in 2 hours. But you can avoid this by transferring 3 lakh to our secure government account for investigation. CBI doesn't call people and ask for money to avoid arrest. I'm calling the police and reporting this number.

Hello, this is Raj from RBI Ombudsman's office. We're filing a case against your bank for causing you financial loss. Oh, which bank? Details will be shared. We need your account credentials to process your compensation of 1.2 lakh. RBI Ombudsman would never ask for account credentials. Sir it's just for verification— This is a fraud. Goodbye.

Sir, naan Trai-la irundhu automatic voice call panureen. Unga number block aagum. Block avoid panna 1 press pannunga. (presses 1) Hello sir, naan customer care-la irundhu pesuren. Unga number unblock panna Aadhaar number verify panna solluvom. Aadhaar-aa? TRAI ippadi call panna maatanga. Scam-nu theriyudhu. Call cut.

Namaste madam, main ek matrimony site se bol raha hoon. Aapka profile premium match ke liye select hua hai. Main already premium member hoon. Haan madam, special VIP match. Sirf 5,000 rupees extra subscription. Yeh mere plan mein already included hai. Nahi madam, yeh alag plan hai. Nahi chahiye, official site se check karungi. Aap scam lag rahe ho.

Hello sir, naan Google Ads support-la irundhu pesuren. Unga account suspended aayiruchu. Enna? Why? Policy violation. But we can restore it. Share unga login credentials with us. Google kabhi credentials phone-la kelkka maatanga. Sir this is an exception case— Illa. Google support portal-la raise pannuvein. Idhu fraud.

Good morning sir, I'm Ananya from Tata Capital. You have a pre-approved car loan of 8 lakhs. I didn't apply. It's pre-approved based on your ITR. Minimal documentation. What details do you need? PAN number and bank account number. I'll check with Tata Capital directly on their official number. Thank you.

Hello sir, naan SBI credit card-la irundhu Meera pesuren. Unga credit limit 1 lakh increase pannalaam. Enna details needed? Sir, OTP come aagum. Share pannunga. Credit limit increase-ku OTP share pannuvaa? Naan bank-ku call pannuvein.

Namaste sir, main Paytm KYC ke liye call kar raha hoon. Aapka KYC pending hai. Kya process hai? Sir, remote access app install karein, hum complete kar denge. Remote access kyun? KYC ke liye aisa nahi hota. Sir fast process hai— Nahi. Paytm app mein khud karunga!!

Hello, this is Rachel from IRDA. Your insurance policy has a premium refund of 22,000 rupees. Which policy? Life insurance sir. Just verify your account number. IRDA doesn't call with refunds. I'll verify on official IRDA website.

Sir, main ek startup se bol raha hoon jo affordable housing provide karta hai. 15 lakh mein 2BHK. Location kahan hai? Outskirts of Hyderabad sir. Very upcoming area. Can I visit the site? Of course sir. But first register karo, 25,000 advance. Site visit se pehle advance? Pehle site dekhna chahta hoon.

Hello sir, you've been shortlisted for an international job in Dubai. 1.5 lakh per month package. Which company? Gulf Constructions sir. But we need 15,000 rupees visa processing fee. Visa fee from the candidate? Yes sir, company will reimburse after joining. I'll research the company first and only use official recruitment channels.

Hello madam, naan EPFO-la irundhu pesuren. Unga PF withdrawal 45,000 rupees pending. Haan, I applied. Madam, process panna bank account last 4 digits confirm pannunga. Last 4 digits-aa? EPFO already account details vachu iruppanga. Madam, system update panni re-verify pannurom. Naan EPFO portal-la check pannuvein. You seem suspicious.

Good afternoon, this is from the Motor Vehicles Department. Your driving license renewal is overdue. Oh, is it? Yes sir. We can process it urgently online. Just a 3,000 rupees fast-track fee. I'll go to the RTO office directly. Sir, long queues. Online is faster. I'll use the official Parivahan website only. Thank you.

Sir, main ek investment platform Wealthy.in se bol raha hoon. Gold bonds mein invest karo, 22% annual returns. 22% guaranteed? Haan sir, gold-backed hai. Koi SEBI registration? Process mein hai sir, but already 10,000 investors hain. SEBI registration process mein hai toh invest nahi karunga. Risk bahut hai.

Hello sir, this is from an ed-tech company. We have an AI course with job guarantee for 15,000 rupees. Which company? SkillUp India sir. 100% placement in 3 months. What's the placement success rate? 98% sir. Can I see reviews and accreditation details? Website par hai sir. Let me verify and get back to you.

Vanakkam madam, naan Naukri.com-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga resume-ku IT company interview call irukku. Enna company? Wipro madam. But background verification-ku 2500 rupees pay pannunga. Background verification-ku candidate fee panna maatanga. Idhu scam.

Hello, is this the owner of the phone number registered with Truecaller? Yes. Sir, your number has 142 spam reports. It will be blocked from all networks permanently. I've never sent spam. Sir, pay 2,000 rupees to dispute and remove the reports. Truecaller doesn't call and charge for this. Scam.

Namaste madam, main ek charity se bol raha hoon. Uttarakhand flood victims ke liye donation chahiye. Kaun si charity? National Relief Trust. PM CARES ya State Disaster Fund mein seedha donate karsakti hoon. Madam hamara trust bhi registered hai. Registration number bhejo email par. Tab consider karungi.

Sir, Tamil Nadu flood relief-ku donation panruveengala? 500 rupees mattum. Enna organization? Tamil People Welfare Fund sir. Government relief fund-la donate pannuvein. Official channels use pannuvein. Thank you.

Hello madam, I'm calling from a Vedic astrology centre. Our astrologer has predicted financial trouble for you. How would you know that? Madam, birthdate analysis. For 5,000 rupees we can do a protective puja. I don't believe in this and you don't even know my birthdate. Madam, it's very effective— Not interested. Goodbye.

Namaste sir, main ek astrologer ki taraf se call kar raha hoon. Aapke ghar mein vastu dosh hai. Kaise pata? Ji, humara AI software location se detect karta hai. 8,000 mein vastu correction hogi. AI se ghar ka vastu? Yeh unscientific aur suspicious hai. Call cut.

Hello sir, naan police department-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga naam drugs case-la irukku. Enna? Naan oru drug use pannalaye. Sir, FIR file aayiruchu. But settle panna 50,000 pay pannunga. Police ippadi call pannaalaam cash kelkka maatanga. Complaint panruven idha pathi.

Hi, this is Sarah from WhatsApp technical team. Your account will be deleted in 24 hours. Why? Policy violation detected. To restore, share the 6-digit code sent to your number. That's my WhatsApp login OTP. Sharing it gives you access to my account. It's for verification only madam— No. WhatsApp doesn't call users. This is a scam.

Hello sir, investment karo cryptocurrency mein. Mere platform par 5x return mil raha hai. 5x matlab 500%? Haan sir, within 6 months. Koi guarantee hai? 100% guaranteed sir. 100% guaranteed crypto returns koi nahi de sakta. Fraud hai yeh.

Yes sir, it's a REIT structure backed by premium properties. SEBI registered? In process sir. But we already have 200 investors. Without SEBI registration I won't invest. Too risky.

Sir, share the OTP sent to your number to transfer points to your account. OTP for reward points? Yes sir, security verification. OTP shouldn't be needed for points. I'll check the NPCI portal myself.

Vanakkam sir, naan NPCI-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga RuPay card-la 8000 reward points expire aaguthu. Eppadi redeem pannuvein? Sir, OTP share pannunga. OTP share pannuvaa reward-ku? Bank portal-la check pannuvein.

Hello sir, Main FASTag helpline se bol raha hoon. Aapka FASTag recharge process mein error aaya. Maine haal hi mein recharge kiya tha. Haan sir, amount refund hoga. OTP share karein. Hello sir, congratulations! Your number selected in BPCL's 50th anniversary lucky draw. What did I win? A holiday package worth 1 lakh rupees! Just pay 8,000 for taxes. Pay taxes to claim holiday prize? Yes sir, mandatory. That's not how prize taxes work. This scam.

Sir, naan HPCL-la irundhu basically, call pannuren. Gas connection loyalty prize — 50,000 rupees. listen, Enakku theriyaadhe. Sir, unga consumer number select aayiruchu. 3000 rupees tax pay pannunga, prize transfer pannuvom. Prize-ku tax pay pannuvaa? Scam dhaan.

Badhai ho madam! actually, Aap Indane Gas 50th anniversary draw ki winner hain! 75,000 rupees! Maine participate nahi kiya tha. Automatic entry hoti hai sab look, consumers ko. Prize ke liye kuch karna hoga? Sirf 5,000 rupees GST pay karo. Prize ke liye GST pehle? Yeh scam hai.

Hello, this is Officer Williams from the Immigration Department. Your visa application has a discrepancy. I submitted everything correctly. Sir, there's a mismatch in your income proof. Pay a penalty of 25,000 to avoid visa cancellation. Immigration pennalties are not apid over phone calls. Sir, this is urgent— I'll contact the embass directly. This sounds fraudulent.

Namaste sir, naan Enforcement Directorate-la irundhu call pannuren. Foreign exchange violation-la unga name irukku. uh... Naan foreign exchange deal pannalaye. basically, Sir, unga account-ku suspicious foreign transfer vandhiruchu. 2 lakh pay panni case settle pannunga. ED kabhi ippadi call pannaalaam. Scam-nu theriyudhu. 1930-ku report panruven.

Hello sir, this is a call from Meesho. Your recent sale proceeds of 2,400 rupees are on hold. Why? There's a seller verification pending. Share your bank OTP to release the amount. Hello madam, naan IRCTC-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga train ticket 1200 rupees refund pending. Haan, ticket cancel panninen. Madam, refund process panna OTP share pannunga. IRCTC automatic-aa account-ku refund panurathu. OTP yen? Madam system update— Naan IRCTC app-la check pannuvein.

Namaste sir, main ek tour operator se bol raha hoon. Maldives trip 4 din, 3 raat, sirf 25,000 rupees per person. Kya included hai? Sir, flight, hotel, breakfast sab. Hello sir, this is from your telecom provider. We have a new unlimited plan for just 99 rupees per month. Which provider? Jio sir. Can you send the details via SMS from an official Jio number? Yes sir, will send shortly. Okay, I'll recharge only after I see the official plan on the Jio website.

Hello sir, this is from India Post. A registered parcel for you could not be delivered. What's inside? We don't know sir, it's registered mail. Namaste madam, main NSDL e-Governance se bol rahi hoon. Aapka Aadhaar update request process ho gaya hai. Achha, koi action leni hai? Nahi madam, sirf confirmation tha. SMS aa gaya hoga. Haan, SMS aya. Shukriya.

Oh, account correct-aa check pannalai. Sorry. Sir, re-present pannuvom. Today fund transfer pannunga. Okay nandri, ippo transfer pannuren.

Namaste sir, main IndusInd Bank se bol raha hoon. Aapki FD kal mature ho rahi hai. Haan, notice mila tha. Sir, auto-renew karna chahenge ya account mein credit karein? Account mein credit kar dijiye. Your SBI account statement for January 2026 is ready. Download it from the SBI YONO app or net banking portal.

Hello, this is Vikram from Apollo 24/7. Your lab report for the cholesterol test is ready. Can you share the values? Total cholesterol is 195, which is within normal range. Full report will be on the app. That's a relief. Thank you. Do consult your doctor for a full review.

Hello madam, naan Dunzo delivery partner pesuren. Unga grocery order ready. I'll buzz you in from the gate. Thank you madam. Oru nimisham.

Namaste sir, main Indian Railway catering se bol raha hoon. Aapka IRCTC e-catering order confirm ho gaya. Kab aayega? Sir, aapke station ke 20 minute pehle delivery hogi. Seat number confirm kar dena. S5, 42. Shukriya.

Hello, is this Arun from Infosys BU4? Yes, speaking. Hi Arun, I'm Kavitha from HR. Just confirming your onboarding slot for Monday at 9 AM. Yes, I'll be there. Please carry your original certificates and 2 passport photos. Sure, noted. Thank you.

Hello sir, I'm Preethi from your insurance company, HDFC Life. I'm calling about your nominee update request. Yes, I submitted the form last week. It's been processed sir. New nominee details are updated. You'll receive confirmation by email. Great, thanks for the update.

Hello sir, this is from a financial advisory firm. We are offering a 3-year bond with 19% annual returns backed by real estate. 19% is quite high. Who's the issuer? Private NBFC sir, not listed but very reputable. Can I see the RBI or SEBI registration? It's an unlisted instrument sir. Different regulatory category. I'll consult a SEBI-registered advisor before investing.

Sir, main ek Ayurvedic health supplement sell karta hoon. 3 mahine mein diabetes control ho jaayegi, guaranteed. Guaranteed cure? Haan sir, natural hai toh side effects bhi nahi. Medical claims verify karna padega. Doctor se poochne ke baad decide karunga. Sir special price abhi hi hai— Nahi, pehle research karunga.

Hello madam, naan oru wellness company-la irundhu call pannuren. Weight loss program, guaranteed 10 kg in 30 days. Guaranteed-aa? Aama madam, herbal products use pannuvom. 5000 rupees only. Medical guarantee claim panna mudiyaadhu. Doctor-ku kelu first.

Hello sir, I'm from an education loan company. We offer loans up to 40 lakhs for abroad education. What's the interest rate? 11% sir. Very competitive. Processing fee? 1.5% sir, upfront. Other banks charge processing fee after disbursal. I'll compare options first.

Namaste sir, hum ek naye fintech startup hain. UPI cashback — har transaction par 5% return. 5% har bar? Haan sir, only first 500 users ke liye. Abhi register karo. Hello sir, this is from a government scholarship helpline. You may be eligible for PM Scholarship. Which scholarship? Sir, for engineering graduates. 50,000 per year. Sir, this is an outreach program— I'll apply directly on National Scholarship Portal.

Sir, naan government welfare department-la irundhu call pannuren. Ration card-ku linked LPG subsidy 3200 rupees pending. Eppadi claim pannuvein? Sir, unga bank account number aur Aadhaar um... confirm pannunga. Government ippadi phone-la details kelkka maatanga. Portal-la check pannuvein.

Hello sir, PMAY subsidy ke liye aapka naam select hua hai. 2.67 lakh housing subsidy milegi. Mujhe kaise pata yeh genuine hai? Sir, bas income certificate aur Aadhaar copy email karein. Pehle official PMAY website par check karunga. Agar eligible hua toh approved channel se apply karunga.

Hello sir, this is from SEBI's investor protection cell. We have detected that you've been victim of a previous fraud. Yes, I lost money in a fake scheme last year. Sir, we are now issuing compensation to victims. You'll receive 1.2 lakh. Just pay 5,000 processing fee. Pay to receive compensation from SEBI? That's not how it works. Sir, this new scheme— SEBI doesn't charge for compensation. This is scam.

Namaste sir, main SEBI se bol raha hoon. Aap ek ponzi scheme ke shikaar hue the. Compensation 80,000 rupees diya ja raha hai. Sacchi? Haan sir. Sirf 4,000 verification fee bhejni hogi. SEBI compensation ke liye fee nahi leti. Yeh fraud hai.

Sir, naan RBI-la irundhu call pannuren. Ungaa account dormant aayiruchu. Reactivate panna unga interrnet banking password confirm pannunga. Password share pannuvaa? Sir, RBI security team dhaan. Safe dhaan. RBI kabhi password kelkka maatanga. Scam dhaan idhu.

Hello, I'm calling from your bank's lona recovery department. You have an unpaid loan of 45,000 rupees. I don't have any loan with you. Sir, this is an old personal loan. Pay now or face legal proceedings. Send me official documentation. Sir, we'lll send agents to your home if not paid today. I'll contact my bank branch directly. If I don't have a loan, this is fraud.

Namaste sir, I'm Officer Yadav from Cyber Crime Branch. We have evidence you accessed illegal content online. I've done nothing illegal. Sir, your IP address was flagged. To close the case pay 75,000 rupees settlement. You're asking me to pay without any formal legal process. I'll consult a lawyer. Sir, don't waste time— I'm calling the real police. Goodbye.

Sir, main Narcotics Control Bureau se bol rha hoon. Aapke address se drugs parcel mila ahi custom mein. Mera address? Galti hai yeh. Sir, case close karne ke liye 1.5 lakh bhejne honge. NCB never asks for money over phone. Main 1930 pe complaint darta hoon.

Hello sir, naan custom department-la irundhu officer Rajan pesuren. Unga name-la parcel-la drugs kandupidichirukkom. Enna? Parcel naan anuppalai. Sir, case close panna 1.2 lakh pay pannunga. Customs officer ippadi phone-la money kelttu maatanga. 1930-ku report panruven.

Hello madam, your Paytm wallet has been suspended due to suspicious activity. What activity? Three failed login attempts madam. Shar OTP to reactivate. OTP to reactivate my accounnt? Hello sir, Google Pay account band ho raha hai suspicious transaction ki wajah se. Kab? Sir, abhi. OTP share karein reactivate karne ke liye. Google Pay kabhi call karke OTP nahi maangta. Fraud hai.

Hello madam, naan PhonePe team-la irundhu call pannuren. Unga account suspicious-aa flag aayiruchu. Enna? Madam, account protect panna OTP share pannunga. PhonePe ippadi call pannaalaam. App-la check pannuvein. Fraud.

Hello sir, this is from the RTO. Your vehicle has challan pending of 8,500 rupees. For what violation? Red light violation sir. Pay via link we'll send you to avoid court summons. I'll check on Parivahan.gov.in myself. Challans can be paid there directly. Sir the link is faster— I'll use the official portal only. Thank you.

Namaste sir, main traffic police se bol raha hoon. Aapke vvehicle par 5,000 ka challan pending hai. Kab kaa? Pichle mahine ki overspeeding. Abhi UPI par bhejein, warrant avoid hoga. Traffic challan UPI par seedha nahi bheja jaata. Vahan.gov.in par pay karunga.

Hello sir, naan oru online trading platform-la irundhu call pannuren. Stock tips service, 95% accuracy. 95% guarantee-aa? Sir, 3 months track record irukku. Monthly 20,000 profit guaranteed. SEBI registered analyst-aa? Sir, processing-la irukku. SEBI registration illama invest panna maatein.

Hello, I'm from international talent agency. You've been shortlisted for modeling assignment in Dubai. I never applied for modeling. Sir, your photo on LinkedIn was noted. 3-day paid assignment, 80,000 rupees. What do I need to do? Just pay 7,500 for visa processing and agency registration. Paying to be hired as a model? This sounds like a fraud recruitment scam.

Hello sir, main ek multinational se HR hoon. Data analyst ke liye shortlist hua hai aap. Maine apply nahi kiya tha. Sir, LinkedIn se chuna gaya aap. Joining ke pehle security deposit 5,000 chahiye. Security deposit for a job? Koi bhi legitimate company aisa nahi maangti. Scam.
